samtools.description: Changed CIGAR string handling in BAM output. Tools parsing CIGAR strings downstream (GATK, bcftools) may produce different results.
Default sorting behavior changed for supplementary alignments. May affect downstream variant callers.

nextflow.description: DSL1 syntax removed entirely. Pipelines using DSL1 will fail to parse.
Process directive 'when' deprecated. Use conditional workflow logic instead.

snakemake.description: Complete rewrite of the execution engine. Rule syntax changes break most existing Snakefiles without migration.

gatk.description: HaplotypeCaller default ploidy model changed. Variant calls may differ significantly on the same input.

STAR.description: Changed default chimeric alignment parameters. Fusion detection pipelines may report different chimeric reads.

bowtie2.description: Scoring function defaults changed. Alignment rates and MAPQ values may differ.

fastqc.description: Updated adapter database and overrepresented sequence detection. Report content may differ but does not affect downstream analysis.

trimmomatic.description: Quality score encoding detection changed. PHRED33/64 auto-detection may behave differently on edge cases.

bcftools.description: VCF normalization behavior changed for multi-allelic sites. Downstream annotation tools may see different variant representations.

deepvariant.description: Updated ML model weights. Variant calls will differ even on identical input data.

pytorch.description: torch.compile() changes default behavior. Models may produce different numerical results due to fusion optimizations.

tensorflow.description: Keras 3 becomes default backend. Model loading from older checkpoints may require compatibility flags.

R.description: Default UTF-8 encoding on Windows. String handling may differ. sample() RNG changed in 4.3.0.

python.description: Removed distutils. Packages relying on distutils will fail to install. Use setuptools instead.

fastp.description: Changed default overlap correction parameters for paired-end data. Minor differences in adapter trimming output.

minimap2.description: Updated chaining algorithm for long reads. Alignment coordinates may shift for complex structural variants.
